system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_tonghop_chitiet_donhang2","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TONGHOP_CHITIET_DONHANG2]
(
	@donhang nvarchar(50),
	@dinhmuc nvarchar(10),
	@loaicapphat nvarchar(50),
	@masp nvarchar(max)
)
AS
BEGIN
	SELECT A.order_number, B.item_number, B.order_qty
	INTO #DONHANG
	FROM tr_order A
		INNER JOIN tr_order_detail B ON A.order_number = B.order_number
	WHERE A.order_number = @donhang AND B.f_cancelled = 'N'

	DECLARE @LENHCAPPHAT TABLE
	(
		donhang nvarchar(200),
		masp nvarchar(200),
		mavt nvarchar(200),
		soluong_can float
	)

	IF @dinhmuc = 'NKI'
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @LENHCAPPHAT(donhang, masp, mavt, soluong_can)
		SELECT C.order_number, A.masp, A.mavt, 
			soluong_can = SUM(A.soluong * C.order_qty)
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim A
			INNER JOIN #DONHANG C ON A.masp = C.item_number
		WHERE 
			CASE 
				WHEN @loaicapphat = 'TRUOCSON' THEN A.HWforWW 
				WHEN @loaicapphat = 'SAUSON' THEN A.HWforPacking
				WHEN @loaicapphat = 'AI' THEN A.HWforAI
			END = 1
		GROUP BY C.order_number, A.masp, A.mavt
	END
	ELSE IF @dinhmuc = 'DGO'
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @LENHCAPPHAT(donhang, masp, mavt, soluong_can)
		SELECT C.order_number, A.masp, A.madonggoi, soluong_can = SUM(A.soluong * C.order_qty)
		FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi A
			INNER JOIN #DONHANG C ON A.masp = C.item_number
		GROUP BY C.order_number, A.masp, A.madonggoi
	END

	IF LEN(@masp) > 0
	BEGIN
		SELECT A.*, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.dvt, B.nhom, 
		CASE 
			WHEN B.giatri_quydoi > 0 AND LEN(B.dvt_quydoi) > 0 THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(A.soluong_can * B.giatri_quydoi, '#,0.###'), ' ', B.dvt_quydoi)
			ELSE NULL
		END
		FROM @LENHCAPPHAT A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		WHERE A.masp IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@masp, ','))
		ORDER BY A.masp, B.mota
	END
	ELSE
	BEGIN
		SELECT A.*, B.mota, B.quycach, B.mausac, B.dvt, B.nhom,
		CASE 
			WHEN B.giatri_quydoi > 0 AND LEN(B.dvt_quydoi) > 0 THEN CONCAT(FORMAT(A.soluong_can * B.giatri_quydoi, '#,0.###'), ' ', B.dvt_quydoi)
			ELSE NULL
		END as ghichu
		FROM @LENHCAPPHAT A
			INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mavt = B.mavt
		ORDER BY A.masp, B.mota
	END
	DROP TABLE #DONHANG;
END
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
